_publications._publicationTitle: Using antisense oligonucleotides for the physiological modulation of the alternative splicing of NF1 exon 23a during PC12 neuronal differentiation.

_contextSnippet: We observed a slight increase in type II isoform expression in differentiated SCs (Fig. 1 C), in accordance with previous results
details: Observed a slight increase in type II isoform expression in differentiated SCs after continuous exposure to high concentrations of forskolin
